title: PyTorch Reference
description: PyTorch tensors, neural networks, training loops, and model building.

items.name: torch.zeros()
items.description: Create a tensor filled with zeros.

items.name: torch.randn()
items.description: Create a tensor with random normal values.

items.name: Tensor Operations
items.code:
a = torch.tensor([1.0, 2.0])
b = torch.tensor([3.0, 4.0])
c = a + b       # element-wise add
d = a @ b       # dot product

items.name: .to(device)
items.description: Move tensor to GPU or CPU.
items.code:
device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')
x = x.to(device)

items.name: nn.Module
items.description: Base class for all neural network modules.

items.name: Training Loop
items.code:
for epoch in range(epochs):
    optimizer.zero_grad()
    output = model(inputs)
    loss = criterion(output, labels)
    loss.backward()
    optimizer.step()
